name: Project Management Dashboard
description: A SaaS platform for teams to manage tasks, track progress with Kanban boards, and collaborate in real-time.

name: ZSlate – Live Canvas Whiteboard
description: A web-based collaborative canvas whiteboard that allows users to draw, sketch ideas, and brainstorm in real-time. Built for teams, creators, and developers to visually plan projects directly in the browser.

name: AI Content Generation Tool
description: A web app that leverages the OpenAI API to help users generate marketing copy, blog posts, and other creative text.

name: CRM System
description: A full-featured CRM for small businesses to manage leads, customers, and sales pipelines with secure authentication.

name: Free Invoice Generator
description: A lightweight web app to create, preview, and download professional invoices quickly — ideal for freelancers and small businesses.
